happyThoughts.quote: Excellent customer service. I wasn't sure how working thru an AI chat would work, but everything has handled quickly.

turns.text:
1. Phemelo Monica Kedige and Phemelo Kedige 
2. Tennis South Africa membership number: TSA131290
3. Phemelo Kedige should be kept primary 
4. The email that previously hosted the profile is [email]

i have not been able to login using this email address ([email]). so im now using [email]

Thanks for sharing those details! Let me make sure I have everything right before we proceed.

It looks like you have two profiles:
- **Phemelo Monica Kedige**
- **Phemelo Kedige** *(preferred primary)*

And you'd like these merged, keeping **Phemelo Kedige** as the primary profile.

Before I can submit this, I just need a couple of things:

1. **Which of these applies to you?**
yes
Thanks! Just to confirm — are both of these profiles yours (i.e., you are the player)?
Yes, both are mine

Got it! And do you have the profile URLs for either profile? They would look like `https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/XXXXXXX`.

If you don't have them, no worries — I can proceed with the display names and your details.
I can help you with that! To get started, which of the following best describes your situation?
Reporting duplicate profiles of my kids

Got it! I'll help you report duplicate profiles for your child. I'll need a few details to get this submitted.

Could you please provide:

1. Your child's full name
2. Their location (city/state and country)
3. Links or Player IDs for the duplicate profiles (or the display names shown on each profile if you don't have the links)
4. Your preferred account email address

1, XIAORAN WANG
2, LONDON, UNITED KINGDOM
3, https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/5084927        https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/5507375
4, [email]
Thank you! Let me look up some information on what to expect when reporting duplicate profiles.

Here's what you can expect after submitting your request:

- The support team will manually review the duplicate profiles.
- The review process may take several business days depending on volume.
- You may be contacted if additional information (such as photo ID) is needed to verify the profiles.
- You'll be notified once the review is complete.
- Please avoid creating any new accounts or making significant changes to the profiles while the request is under review.

Here's a summary of what I'll submit:

- Child's name: Xiaoran Wang
- Location: London, United Kingdom
- Primary profile: https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/5084927
- Duplicate profile: https://app.utrsports.net/profiles/5507375
- Your email: [email]

Is there anything else you'd like to add, or shall I go ahead and submit the ticket?
yes please go ahead

Your support ticket has been submitted successfully — your ticket number is #829592.

The support team will review the duplicate profiles for Xiaoran Wang and reach out if they need any additional information. Remember to avoid making significant changes to either profile while the request is being processed.

Is there anything else I can help you with today?
no thx
You're welcome! Have a great day! 😊
Soy
¡Hola! Soy Stewart, tu asistente de soporte de UTR Sports. ¿En qué puedo ayudarte hoy?
Soy el papa de denis salazar el tiene otra cuenta denis javier salazar alvarado quiero fusionar las dos cuenta

Entendido — necesito ayudarte a fusionar las dos cuentas de Denis. Voy a recopilar la información necesaria.

¿Tienes los enlaces a ambos perfiles de Denis, o me das el nombre de usuario y la ciudad/estado de cada uno para que nuestro equipo los encuentre?
La una es Denis Salazar Guayaquil ecuador, la otra es denis javier salazar alvarado  ecuador
Perfecto. Ahora necesito saber: **¿cuál de los dos perfiles prefieres mantener como el principal?** ¿El de "Denis Salazar" o el de "Denis Javier Salazar Alvarado"?
